scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (features, notes, components, products). Productboard's write endpoints (feature/note/component creation and updates) are out of scope; legacy itself ships no writes (capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented note creation; not implemented in this bundle
legacy connector never implemented feature updates; not implemented in this bundle
feature status taxonomy not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
user/portal-user data not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
